name: Nuinsco Resources Limited
summary: Nuinsco Resources Limited engages in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of properties for precious and base metals. It explores for gold, phosphorus, phosphate, niobium, tantalum, uranium, rare earth elements, and other elements and compounds. The company owns 100% interests in the Prairie Lake project that consists of 46 mining claims covering an area of 608 hectares located near Marathon, Ontario; and the Sunbeam gold property, which comprises 113 unpatented mining claims that covers an area of 49.4 square kilometers located to the northeast of Atikokan, north-western Ontario. It also holds an interest in the El Sid gold project located in the Eastern Desert of Egypt. Nuinsco Resources Limited is based in Toronto, Canada.
